text: Notice may be given by email to the address specified below and shall be deemed received on the next business day following transmission.
Notice by email is permitted with no further terms specified.
All notices shall be sent to the addresses set forth on the signature page, or to such other address as a party may designate by notice.
Any notice required or permitted under this Agreement shall be given in writing and shall be deemed effective upon actual receipt by the party to whom it is directed.
The Agreement does not describe any procedure for how the parties are to notify each other of matters arising under it.
All notices under this Agreement must be in writing and shall be deemed given only when delivered in accordance with this Section.
Notice may be given orally or by any other means the notifying party considers appropriate.
Notices shall be given as the parties see fit.
